entries.message:
We are currently experiencing an issue with the service which sends commands to Baremetal servers. The servers remain online but sending any commands from the console.vultr.com portal and the direct access console itself will not work. You may still access and reboot your servers via SSH if necessary during this time.

We greatly appreciate your patience in this matter.

Thank you
The Vultr.com Team

Event Type: Network Upgrade

We are performing system changes in the Toronto location during the following scheduled maintenance window. 

Start Time: 2026-06-02 04:00:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-06-02 09:00:00 UTC

We schedule higher impact maintenance events during off-peak times to maintain our ideal hosting environment. Our engineers make every effort to minimize system impact; however, Toronto instances may be unreachable for some, or all, of the scheduled maintenance window as we perform network, firmware, or host upgrades.

Event Type: Network Upgrade

We are performing system changes in the Tokyo location during the following scheduled maintenance window. 

Start Time: 2026-06-08 15:05:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-06-08 19:05:00 UTC

We schedule higher impact maintenance events during off-peak times to reduce impact to customer infrastructure. Our engineers make every effort to minimize system impact, however, network reachability to Tokyo instances may be affected for some, or all, of the scheduled maintenance window as we perform this work. While it’s important to be aware of start and end times of the maintenance window, due to our redundant network architecture, our engineers expect that you may see little to no impact at all while the work is performed.
